datapoints.description: PLEG relist duration P99 in milliseconds (>3000 indicates PLEG health issue)
datapoints.name: pleg_relist_p99_ms

datapoints.description: Container runtime operation errors per second (CRI-O operation failures)
datapoints.name: runtime_errors_rate

datapoints.description: Pod startup duration P99 in milliseconds
datapoints.name: pod_start_p99_ms

datapoints.description: Number of pods currently running on this node
datapoints.name: running_pods

datapoints.description: Number of containers in running state on this node
datapoints.name: running_containers

datapoints.description: Pod evictions per second on this node (all eviction signals)
datapoints.name: evictions_rate

datapoints.description: Kubelet client certificate TTL in seconds for this node
datapoints.name: cert_ttl_seconds

description: Per-node kubelet health including PLEG, CRI-O runtime, pod startup, and eviction metrics via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Multi-instance per node. Discovery uses kubelet_node_name to enumerate nodes. PLEG relist P99 >3s indicates PLEG health check will fail. Runtime errors track CRI-O operation failures. Latency metrics converted from seconds to milliseconds.
name: OCP_Kubelet_Health
